/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/face_attendance.dir/main_pipeline.cpp.o -o face_attendance  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libsqlite3.tbd libstorage_lib.a libface_recognition_lib.a libliveness_detector_lib.a libstorage_lib.a /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libsqlite3.tbd /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_highgui.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_videoio.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_face.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_objdetect.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_dnn.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_calib3d.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_features2d.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_flann.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_photo.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_imgproc.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_core.4.13.0.dylib
